channel.title: Luzerge Blog
channel.description: Website monitoring, CDN management, and web security insights for Philippine businesses.

item.title: Why Website Security Starts with Monitoring
item.description: Most cyberattacks succeed not because defenses are weak, but because the target didn't know they were vulnerable. Uptime monitoring, SSL management, and DDoS protection form the first line of defense.

item.title: How Bot Fight Mode Protects Your Website from Automated Threats
item.description: Bots account for nearly half of all internet traffic. Cloudflare's Bot Fight Mode uses machine learning to detect and challenge malicious bots in real time.

item.title: Setting Up Cloudflare for Your Philippine Business
item.description: A step-by-step walkthrough for Filipino business owners. Create a Cloudflare account, transfer DNS, enable caching, configure SSL, and connect to Luzerge.

item.title: What Is Always Online and Why Your Site Needs It
item.description: Server outages happen. Always Online serves a cached snapshot of your site during downtime so visitors still see content instead of error pages.

item.title: Understanding CDN Cache Hit Rates and How to Improve Them
item.description: Your cache hit rate directly affects page load speed and bandwidth costs. Five practical tips to push your Cloudflare cache hit rate above 95%.

item.title: Email Routing with Cloudflare: Free Custom Email for Your Domain
item.description: Create unlimited custom email addresses like info@yourdomain.com and forward them to Gmail or Outlook for free using Cloudflare Email Routing.

item.title: How to Read HTTP Response Headers for Security and Performance
item.description: Every HTTP response contains headers that reveal how your server is configured. Learn what good security and cache headers look like.

item.title: Introducing Luzerge: Website Monitoring Built for Philippine SMEs
item.description: We built Luzerge because Philippine businesses deserve affordable, enterprise-grade website monitoring. Priced in pesos, built on Cloudflare's global network.
